Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENTS

Title: Authorizes the town of Brookhaven to alienate certain lands used as parklands and to lease such lands for cell tower installation
Summary: Authorizes the town of Brookhaven to alienate certain lands used as parklands and to lease such lands for a cell tower installation.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the town of Brookhaven in Suffolk county to alienate certain lands used as parklands for the purposes of installing a cellular tower
